prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: marketing still. Story world: Black Chapel Ledger. Premise: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money.. Setting: Cliffside cathedral archive district. Threat presence: The Creditor. Recurring motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax. Design vertical social launch creative with hook-forward typography zone and one undeniable clue motif.. Subgenre: gothic horror. Tone: EERIE. Immediate scene brief: Black Chapel Ledger Social Launch Vertical. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-contrast marketing still with a clean focal read, premium horror mood, and room for external campaign copy to be added later.
source_prompt: Story: Black Chapel Ledger (black-chapel-ledger) | Hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money. | Subgenre: gothic horror | Tone: EERIE | Location: Cliffside cathedral archive district | Villain: The Creditor | Villain worldview: Every truth must be paid for, and mercy is fraud. | Motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax.
